goal: Resolve a product's Dianxiaomi/AliExpress publish category dynamically from Amazon/edit.json data and learned category evidence.

adjacentCategoryPolicy.aliexpressEvidenceRole: Constrains product family and prevents obvious mismatch; it does not require the Dianxiaomi visible leaf text to be identical.
adjacentCategoryPolicy.safeAdjacentPrinciple: same use, same physical form, and no obvious mismatch; exact AliExpress leaf text is not required when Dianxiaomi lacks the exact category
adjacentCategoryPolicy.domClickFailureRecovery: use real coordinate double-click on the exact visible search-result row, then verify main-form category writeback

sessionPolicy.verificationPageHandling: record aliexpress_verification_required and wait for user login/captcha completion

rerunAliExpressEvidenceWhen: new product family not in learned rules
title/image/use does not match learned rule scope
Dianxiaomi visible category path cannot be found
save or publish preflight reports category/attribute mismatch

requiredResolverOutput.requiredProperties: Required productPropertyListJson defaults or extraction rules
requiredResolverOutput.optionValues: Required option values such as Ships From
requiredResolverOutput.evidence: Matched terms, source category, or captured payload reference
